## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a complete enumeration of status outputs.

## Discussion

Use this function to encapsulate the initial token of a GSS-API context establishment sequence. It incorporates an identifier of the mechanism type used on that context, and enables unambiguous interpretation of tokens at GSS-API peers.

Use [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_decapsulate_token(_:_:_:)] at the peer to reverse the encapsulation.

# gss_encapsulate_token(_:_:_:)

**Function**

Returns a buffer encapsulating the given token.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_encapsulate_token(_ input_token: gss_const_buffer_t, _ oid: gss_const_OID, _ output_token: gss_buffer_t) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **input_token**: A buffer holding the token to be encapsulated.
- **oid**: The token’s object identifier.
- **output_token**: A buffer the function fills with the encapsulated token. Release this buffer’s memory with a call to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_buffer(_:_:)] when you are done with it.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a complete enumeration of status outputs.

## Discussion

Use this function to encapsulate the initial token of a GSS-API context establishment sequence. It incorporates an identifier of the mechanism type used on that context, and enables unambiguous interpretation of tokens at GSS-API peers.

Use [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_decapsulate_token(_:_:_:)] at the peer to reverse the encapsulation.

## Encapsulation and Decapsulation

- **gss_decapsulate_token(_:_:_:)**: Returns a token encapsulated in a buffer.
